creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
sbruno@alice:~ % host ftp5.freebsd.org
ftp5.freebsd.org is an alias for xyz.csail.mit.edu.
xyz.csail.mit.edu has address 128.30.3.18
xyz.csail.mit.edu mail is handled by 2 incoming.csail.mit.edu.
xyz.csail.mit.edu mail is handled by 1 khavrinen.csail.mit.edu.


This is a mirror.  Hopefully, they'll notice and catch up.
